name: Bantas Bandirma Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Bantas Bandirma Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in tin packaging production activities. The company offers tin cans for olives, cheese, pickles, and olive and vegetable oils. It also serves the mineral oil, and paint industries. In addition, the company exports its products worldwide. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Balikesir, Turkey.
